scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http-get://localhost:5173 file:./dist/main.js file:./dist/preload.js && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 nodemon --signal SIGTERM --delay 250ms --watch dist --ext js --exec "electron ."
scripts.pack: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.release: npm run build && node ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
